extracted_fields.title: Siemens SCALANCE W Products Vulnerabilities
affected_products: Siemens SCALANCE W700 Series (all versions prior to V6.5.0)
Siemens SCALANCE W1700 Series (all versions prior to V2.0.1)
Siemens SCALANCE WAM763-1 (all versions prior to V3.0.0)
extracted_fields.remediation_summary: Siemens has released firmware updates to address these vulnerabilities.
extracted_fields.summary: CISA is aware of multiple critical vulnerabilities in Siemens SCALANCE W-700 and W-1700 series industrial wireless access points.

export_payload.parsed_text_excerpt:
ICSA-24-046-01: Siemens SCALANCE W Products Vulnerabilities

Release Date: February 15, 2024
Severity: Critical

CVE-2024-23814, CVE-2024-23815, CVE-2024-23816
